channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Success Center Tutoring Canceled
item.description: All Tutoring is canceled for Spring Break (Sunday, 3/1-Friday, 3/6) including Drop-In Tutoring and Small Group Tutoring. Success Center Tutoring will resume on Sunday, 3/8.
item.author: Students

item.title: Financial Research Resources Available to All RPI Students
item.description: All RPI students have access to financial research tools through the Lally School of Management, including Bloomberg, FactSet, S&P Capital IQ, Wharton Research Data Services (WRDS), and more. Visit the Lally website to learn more about available resources and how to access them.
item.author: Students

item.title: Department of Defense graduate funding programs information session to be held March 4th at noon
item.description: Date: Wednesday, March 4, 2026 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM - The National Defense Science and Engineering Graduate Fellowship provides 3 years of tuition and salary for PhD students in STEM fields; there is no service requirement! The SMART Scholarship for Service program provides 1 to 5 years of tuition and salary for undergrads, master’s and PhD Students. Scholars will work in DoD labs during summers and post graduation. Register for link…
item.author: Students

item.title: Webinar-March 6: Webex Training Session
item.description: Join us on Friday, March 6, from 11am-12pm for a hands-on Webex Training Session, part of the MMS Collaboration Software Training series. This session focuses on the Webex application and its integration with Outlook and Blackboard, so you can efficiently schedule, launch, and manage meetings directly from the tools you use every day. Register now: https://rensselaer.webex.com/webappng/sites/rensselaer/webinar/webinarSeries/register/783d951c6ab8482e9198a7bd6075a700
item.author: Community

item.title: Small Group Tutoring Options at the Success Center
item.description: Did you know that you can easily book online a small group tutoring session in many of RPI’s upper-level courses? Check out the fantastic small group tutoring sessions being offered at the Success Center!
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI Libraries: Guided Group Tours
item.description:
Guided library tours are now available for students, faculty, staff, and campus groups at both the Folsom Library and the Architecture Library. These brief, bookable tours introduce library spaces, services, and resources, and can be customized to fit your group’s needs or research interests…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
